name: Misr Allecha
recipeInstructions:
Misr Allecha is a spiced red lentil puree.
Soak lentils for one hour. Cook for 30 minutes. Drain.
Mash and set aside.
In a dry pan over moderate low heat, stir fry the onion
and garlic for 2 minutes. Add the oil and stir fry
for another minute.
Add the mashed lentils, turmeric, salt, and chili. Mix well.
Add the water and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes to reduce
the mixture to a thick, red, well-spiced puree.
Serve warm with Injeera.
